flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 30% at Saint Mary's College of California vs the 2004–2008 baseline (2.0k vs 2.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Saint Mary's College of California rose 20% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.6k → $14.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Mary's College of California rose 14% between 2007 and 2010 ($31.1k → $35.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saint Mary's College of California rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($51.8k → $57.8k).
